description: Full problem details included in the notification payload. Contains the same data as the Problems API v2 GET response for this problem.

id.description: The internal unique identifier of the problem.

title.description: The problem title generated by Davis AI.

severityLevel.description: The severity level of the problem.

status.description: The current status of the problem.

startTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem started.

endTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem ended. Returns -1 if the problem is still open.

affectedEntities.description: The list of entities directly affected by the problem.

name: ProblemDetails
